name: SIT S.p.A.
summary: SIT S.p.A. develops, manufactures, and sells measuring devices and systems for the domestic gas equipment worldwide. The company offers mechanical controls, such as electrical on off, electrical and air/gas modulation, mixer, and thermostatic and manual controls; electronic controls, including burner controls, heat recovery units, and controls for appliances; fans for condensing and atmospheric boilers, and electric fans for pellet stoves-extractor hoods and air recirculation; and integrated systems. It also provides sensors comprising thermocouples, oxyprotectors, oxypilots, sensing elements, temperature sensors devices, pressure switches, and pilot burners; flue kits consisting of coaxial and twin flue systems, exhaust and condensing kits, roof terminal and cascade systems, and condensate traps; fans for range hoods; accessories; and gas meters. The company was founded in 1953 and is headquartered in Padua, Italy. SIT S.p.A. is a subsidiary of SIT Technologies Spa.
